title: AS 1720.1:2010 Timber Bearing Check
description: Check structural timber members for local bearing in accordance with AS 1720.1:2010.

member_label.description: Member Label. Label for the timber member.

seasoned.description: Treatment. Unseasoned timber has an average moisture content that exceeds 25%.

hard_soft.description: Species Type. Is the timber species a hardwood or softwood?

section.description: Section. Symbol: Section. Typical section sizes from manufactures taken from SkyCiv Section Library.If required size not available use 'custom' to input width and depth of section manually.

d.description: d. Symbol: d. Units: mm. Section Depth.

b.description: b. Symbol: b. Units: mm. Section Width.

bearing_check_type.description: Bearing Check Type. Select the type of bearing check to perform.

bearing_type.description: Bearing Face. Face of timber which is bearing against support.

bearing_placement.description: Bearing Placement. Placement of bearing block in relation to timber member.

strength_group.description: Strength Group. Strength group as per Appendix H.

bearing_length.description: Bearing Length. Symbol: l. Units: mm. Bearing Length.

bearing_position.description: Bearing Position. Symbol: \text{Bearing}. Bearing position in relation to end of timber member.

N.description: N*. Symbol: N^*. Units: kN. Design bearing force

angle.description: Angle. Symbol: θ. Units: °. Angle between load and grain (degrees).

duration.description: Load Duration. Used to calculate k1 factor as per 2.4.1.1 AS 1720. For example, wind and Earthquake loads have a 5 second duration. Dead loads have a 50+ year duration.

application.description: Member Application. This dropdown relates to the determination of the capacity factor based on Table 2.1 of AS 1720.

house.description: Building Type. If the building is a house a less conservative reduction factor can be adopted where the member does not impact an area greater than 25 m2. See Table 2.1 AS 1720.

area.description: Area of Failure Impact. If failure is likely to impact an area greater than 25 m2 select '≥ 25 m2'. See Table 2.1 AS 1720.

EMC.description: Moisture. Units: %. Equilibrium Moisture Content. Highest value of the annual average moisture content (%) that the timber will attain in service. For reference seasoned timber has a MC  25%.

k6.description: k6. Symbol: k_6. Temperature factor that reduces the strength of seasoned timber at high temperature locations.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
